# Codebase structure and model exploration (2026-03-12 19:42Z)

_**User**_

Explore the codebase structure of /data/Zhengyang/alpamayo to understand:
1. The overall project structure (key directories and files)
2. What model is being used (look for model definitions, configs)
3. How camera inputs are handled - specifically look for references to "front cam", "30fov", camera configurations, and multi-camera input handling
4. Look for any data loading or preprocessing code that handles multiple camera inputs

Be very thorough. Return a comprehensive summary of:
- Project directory structure
- Model architecture (what kind of model, what inputs it takes)
- Camera configuration (how many cameras, what FOVs, how they're named)
- Data pipeline (how inputs are loaded and preprocessed)

            "text": "class AlpamayoR1(ReasoningVLA):",

            "text": "    ):",

            "text": "        super().__init__(config, pretrained_modules, original_vocab_size, print_param_count=False)",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "        # we only need the text config for the expert model",

            "lineNumber": 145

            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 150
          },

            "lineNumber": 152

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-03-04_18-20Z-model-input-and-output-analysis.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "Alpamayo-R1 是 NVIDIA 提出的一个 **Vision-Language-Action (VLA)** 模型，用于自动驾驶场景。论文全名为 *\"Alpamayo-R1: Bridging Reasoning and Action Prediction for Generalizable Autonomous Driving in the Long Tail\"*（[arXiv:2511.00088](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.00088)）。其核心创新在于将 **Chain-of-Causation (CoC) 推理**与**轨迹扩散生成**结合起来。",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "### 二、模型输入",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "模型的输入由三大部分组成：",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 1. 多相机图像 — 视觉感知",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "image_frames: (N_cameras, num_frames, 3, H, W)",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "- **4 个摄像头**：前方广角(120°FOV)、前方长焦(30°FOV)、左侧交叉(120°FOV)、右侧交叉(120°FOV)",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "- **每个摄像头 4 帧**：在 t0 时刻前 0.3s ~ t0，以 10Hz 采样（即 &#96;[t0-0.3s, t0-0.2s, t0-0.1s, t0]&#96;）",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "- 推理时展平为 &#96;(16, 3, H, W)&#96; 共 16 张图像输入",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "从 &#96;helper.py&#96; 的 &#96;create_message&#96; 函数可以看到，这些图像作为多模态消息中的 &#96;{\"type\": \"image\"}&#96; 传入 Qwen3-VL 的 chat template。",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 2. 自车历史轨迹 — 运动学上下文",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "ego_history_xyz: (1, 1, 16, 3)    # 历史 16 个位置 (1.6s @ 10Hz)",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "ego_history_rot: (1, 1, 16, 3, 3)  # 历史 16 个旋转矩阵",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "- 代表过去 1.6 秒内自车在 **t0 时刻局部坐标系**下的位姿轨迹",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "- 通过 &#96;DeltaTrajectoryTokenizer&#96; 编码成 **48 个离散 token**",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "- 这些 token 被注入到文本序列的 &#96;&lt;|traj_history_start|&gt;...&lt;|traj_history_end|&gt;&#96; 占位符中",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "从 &#96;base_model.py&#96; 的 &#96;fuse_traj_tokens&#96; 方法可见：",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;44:46:src/alpamayo_r1/models/base_model.py",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"history\": \"&lt;|traj_history|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"history_start\": \"&lt;|traj_history_start|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"history_end\": \"&lt;|traj_history_end|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 3. 文本 Prompt — 任务指令",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "从 &#96;helper.py&#96; 可以看到完整的消息结构：",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;38:67:src/alpamayo_r1/helper.py",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "    return [",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 175
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3515334129333496
    },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"Configuration classes for Alpamayo R1 release models.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Any",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "from alpamayo_r1.models.base_model import ReasoningVLAConfig",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "class AlpamayoR1Config(ReasoningVLAConfig):",
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        action_in_proj_cfg: dict[str, Any] | None = None,",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "        expert_cfg: dict[str, Any] | None = None,",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        keep_same_dtype: bool = True,",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        expert_non_causal_attention: bool = True,",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        **kwargs: Any,",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    ) -&gt; None:",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 39
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/alpamayo_r1/models/base_model.py",
        "range": {

              "startPosition": {

            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "class ReasoningVLA(PreTrainedModel, TrajectoryFusionMixin):",
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "    @classmethod",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "    def from_pretrained_submodules(",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "        cls,",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "        config: ReasoningVLAConfig,",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "    ) -&gt; \"ReasoningVLA\":",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Load submodules with pretrained submodules and initialize the model.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "        pretrained_modules = {}",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "        # Load VLM",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "        vlm = Qwen3VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "            config.vlm_name_or_path,",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "            dtype=config.model_dtype,",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "            attn_implementation=config.attn_implementation,",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "        original_vocab_size = vlm.config.text_config.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "        vlm.resize_token_embeddings(config.vocab_size)",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "        vlm.config.text_config.vocab_size = config.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "        vlm.config.vocab_size = config.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "        pretrained_modules[\"vlm\"] = vlm",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "        if config.traj_tokenizer_cfg is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "            traj_tokenizer = hyu.instantiate(config.traj_tokenizer_cfg)",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "            pretrained_modules[\"traj_tokenizer\"] = traj_tokenizer",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "        return cls(",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "            config,",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "            pretrained_modules=pretrained_modules,",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "            original_vocab_size=original_vocab_size,",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "    def get_output_embeddings(self) -&gt; torch.nn.Module:",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Get the output embeddings of the model.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "        return self.vlm.get_output_embeddings()",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "text": "    def get_input_embeddings(self) -&gt; torch.nn.Module:",
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Get the input embeddings of the model.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "        return self.vlm.language_model.embed_tokens",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "    def tie_weights(self) -&gt; None:",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Delegate weight tying to the nested VLM model.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "        if hasattr(self.vlm, \"tie_weights\"):",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "text": "            self.vlm.tie_weights()",
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.32156631350517273
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/alpamayo_r1/models/action_in_proj.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 100,
            "column": 77

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "class PerWaypointActionInProjV2(torch.nn.Module):",
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Improved per-waypoint action input projection module.",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    It uses FourierEncoderV2 with logarithmically-spaced frequencies and includes layer normalization. Projects",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    action sequences with timestep information into a higher-dimensional representation.",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "        self,",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "        in_dims: list[int],",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "        out_dim: int,",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "        num_enc_layers: int = 4,",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "        hidden_size: int = 1024,",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "        max_freq: float = 100.0,",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "        num_fourier_feats: int = 20,",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "    ):",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Initialize the per-waypoint action projection module V2.",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "        Args:",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "            in_dims: List of input dimensions. The last element specifies the number",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "                of action dimensions to encode separately.",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "            out_dim: Output dimension of the projection.",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "            num_enc_layers: Number of layers in the MLP encoder. Defaults to 4.",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "            hidden_size: Hidden dimension size of the MLP encoder. Defaults to 1024.",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "            max_freq: Maximum frequency for the Fourier encoding. Defaults to 100.0.",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "            num_fourier_feats: Number of Fourier features for encoding. Defaults to 20.",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        super().__init__()",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.in_dims = in_dims",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.out_dim = out_dim",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "        sinus = []",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "        for _ in range(in_dims[-1]):",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "            sinus.append(FourierEncoderV2(dim=num_fourier_feats, max_freq=max_freq))",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.sinus = nn.ModuleList(sinus)",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.timestep_fourier_encoder = FourierEncoderV2(dim=num_fourier_feats, max_freq=max_freq)",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "        num_input_feats = sum(s.out_dim for s in self.sinus) + self.timestep_fourier_encoder.out_dim",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.encoder = MLPEncoder(",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "            num_input_feats=num_input_feats,",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "            num_enc_layers=num_enc_layers,",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "            hidden_size=hidden_size,",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "            outdim=out_dim,",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(out_dim)",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor, timesteps: torch.Tensor) -&gt; torch.Tensor:",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 149
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3190374970436096
    },

            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"Base Reasoning VLA model implementation for Alpamayo R1 release.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "import logging",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Any",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "import einops",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "import hydra.utils as hyu",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "import torch",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "from transformers import (",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    AutoProcessor,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    PretrainedConfig,",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    PreTrainedModel,",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    Qwen3VLConfig,",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    Qwen3VLForConditionalGeneration,",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "# Constants",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "IGNORE_INDEX = -100",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "TRAJ_TOKEN = {",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"history\": \"&lt;|traj_history|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"future\": \"&lt;|traj_future|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"history_start\": \"&lt;|traj_history_start|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"future_start\": \"&lt;|traj_future_start|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"history_end\": \"&lt;|traj_history_end|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"future_end\": \"&lt;|traj_future_end|&gt;\",",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "SPECIAL_TOKENS_KEYS = [",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"prompt_start\",",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"prompt_end\",",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"image_start\",",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"image_pre_tkn\",",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"image_end\",",
            "lineNumber": 49

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-03-04_18-20Z-model-input-and-output-analysis.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 264
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 316
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;324:354:src/alpamayo_r1/models/alpamayo_r1.py",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "        def step_fn(",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "            x: torch.Tensor,",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "            t: torch.Tensor,",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "        ) -&gt; torch.Tensor:",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "            # x: (B*, *action_dim)",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "            # t: broadcastable to x leading dims",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "            b_star = x.shape[0]",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "            future_token_embeds = self.action_in_proj(x, t)",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "            // ... expert transformer forward with KV cache ...",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "            pred = self.action_out_proj(last_hidden).view(",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "                -1, *self.action_space.get_action_space_dims()",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "            )  # (b*, Tf, C_action) -&gt; noise/vector field",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "            return pred",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "### 五、总结表",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "| | 详情 |",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "|---|---|",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "| **输入 1** | 多相机图像：4 摄像头 × 4 帧 = 16 张图像 (RGB) |",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "| **输入 2** | 自车历史轨迹：16 步位姿（1.6s @ 10Hz），编码为 48 个离散 token |",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "| **输入 3** | 文本提示：系统角色 + 图像 + 历史轨迹 + 任务指令 |",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "| **输出 1** | 未来轨迹：64 个路点的 xyz 位置和 3×3 旋转矩阵（6.4s @ 10Hz） |",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "| **输出 2** | CoC 推理文本：因果链式推理过程的自然语言描述 |",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "| **核心架构** | Qwen3-VL (10B) + CoC 自回归推理 + Diffusion Expert (Flow Matching) + Unicycle 运动学 |",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "这个模型的设计精妙之处在于：**用 VLM 做场景理解和因果推理，用扩散模型做精确的轨迹生成**，两者通过 KV Cache 桥接，既保留了大语言模型的推理能力，又获得了扩散模型在连续空间中的高质量生成能力。",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "@\\data\\Zhengyang\\alpamayo\\notebooks\\inference.ipynb:11 那我修改这个参数的时候，它是一个模型运行了三次然后出了三条轨迹吗？",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "这是个好问题。答案是：**不是运行三次模型，但也不是完全只运行一次**。让我结合代码具体解释。",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "### &#96;num_traj_samples&#96; 的实际行为",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "当你把 &#96;num_traj_samples&#96; 设为 3 时，模型的行为是：",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 阶段 1：VLM 自回归生成 CoC — 运行 3 次（并行）",
            "lineNumber": 315
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3067021369934082
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/alpamayo_r1/models/base_model.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 199
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 444
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 200,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 201,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "class ReasoningVLAConfig(PretrainedConfig):",
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "    def _build_processor(self) -&gt; AutoProcessor:",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Build the processor with trajectory tokens.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "        processor_kwargs = {}",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "        if self.min_pixels is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "            processor_kwargs[\"min_pixels\"] = self.min_pixels",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "        if self.max_pixels is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "            processor_kwargs[\"max_pixels\"] = self.max_pixels",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "        processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(self.vlm_name_or_path, **processor_kwargs)",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "        tokenizer = processor.tokenizer",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "        # Add traj tokens to the tokenizer",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "        if self.traj_vocab_size is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "            discrete_tokens = [f\"&lt;i{v}&gt;\" for v in range(self.traj_vocab_size)]",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "            num_new_tokens = tokenizer.add_tokens(discrete_tokens)",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "            assert len(discrete_tokens) == num_new_tokens",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.traj_token_start_idx = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(\"&lt;i0&gt;\")",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.traj_token_end_idx = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "                f\"&lt;i{self.traj_vocab_size - 1}&gt;\"",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "            )",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "        if self.add_special_tokens:",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "            special_tokens = list(SPECIAL_TOKENS.values())",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.add_tokens(special_tokens, special_tokens=True)",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "        else:",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.add_tokens(list(TRAJ_TOKEN.values()), special_tokens=True)",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "        tokenizer.traj_token_ids = {",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "            k: tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(v) for k, v in TRAJ_TOKEN.items()",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "        return processor",
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "class ReasoningVLA(PreTrainedModel, TrajectoryFusionMixin):",
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Reasoning Vision-Language-Action model.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 286
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30593883991241455
    },

      "codeBlock": {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "import einops",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "import numpy as np",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "import torch",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "class DeltaTrajectoryTokenizer:",
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Delta trajectory tokenizers.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "        self,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "        ego_xyz_min: tuple[float, float, float] = (-4, -4, -10),",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "        ego_xyz_max: tuple[float, float, float] = (4, 4, 10),",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "        ego_yaw_min: float = -np.pi,",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        ego_yaw_max: float = np.pi,",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "        num_bins: int = 1000,",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        predict_yaw: bool = False,",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        load_weights: bool = False,",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    ):",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Initializes the tokenizer.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.ego_xyz_min = ego_xyz_min",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.ego_xyz_max = ego_xyz_max",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.num_bins = num_bins",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._predict_yaw = predict_yaw",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.ego_yaw_min = ego_yaw_min",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.ego_yaw_max = ego_yaw_max",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    @property",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    def vocab_size(self) -&gt; int:",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Tokens are integers from the set {0, 1, ..., vocab_size - 1}\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        return self.num_bins",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    def encode(",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        self,",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        hist_xyz: torch.Tensor,",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "class ReasoningVLA(PreTrainedModel, TrajectoryFusionMixin):",
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "    def _build_tokenizer(self, config: ReasoningVLAConfig) -&gt; Any:",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Build tokenizer with trajectory tokens.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "        processor_kwargs = {}",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "        if config.min_pixels is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "text": "            processor_kwargs[\"min_pixels\"] = config.min_pixels",
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "        if config.max_pixels is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "            processor_kwargs[\"max_pixels\"] = config.max_pixels",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "        processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(config.vlm_name_or_path, **processor_kwargs)",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "        tokenizer = processor.tokenizer",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "        if config.traj_vocab_size is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "text": "            discrete_tokens = [f\"&lt;i{v}&gt;\" for v in range(config.traj_vocab_size)]",
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.add_tokens(discrete_tokens)",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.traj_token_start_idx = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(\"&lt;i0&gt;\")",
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "        if config.add_special_tokens:",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.add_tokens(list(SPECIAL_TOKENS.values()), special_tokens=True)",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "text": "        else:",
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "            tokenizer.add_tokens(list(TRAJ_TOKEN.values()), special_tokens=True)",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "        tokenizer.traj_token_ids = {",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "            k: tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(v) for k, v in TRAJ_TOKEN.items()",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "text": "        return tokenizer",
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "    def _initialize_vlm_backbone(",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "        self,",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "        config: ReasoningVLAConfig,",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "        pretrained_modules: dict[str, Any],",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "        original_vocab_size: int | None = None,",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "    ) -&gt; None:",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Initialize the VLM backbone based on configuration.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "        if \"vlm\" in pretrained_modules:",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "text": "            self.vlm = pretrained_modules[\"vlm\"]",
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "            self.original_vocab_size = original_vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "text": "        else:",
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "            self._initialize_qwenvl3_vlm(config)",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "    def _initialize_qwenvl3_vlm(self, config: ReasoningVLAConfig) -&gt; None:",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 368
          }
        ]
      },

      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "class MLPEncoder(nn.Module):",
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Basic MLP encoder.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(self, num_input_feats: int, num_enc_layers: int, hidden_size: int, outdim: int):",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "        super().__init__()",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        assert 1 &lt;= num_enc_layers, f\"{num_enc_layers=} must be &gt;= 1\"",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        enc_layers = [",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "            nn.Linear(num_input_feats, hidden_size),",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "            nn.SiLU(),",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        ]",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        for layeri in range(num_enc_layers):",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "            if layeri &lt; num_enc_layers - 1:",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "                enc_layers.extend(",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "                    [",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "                        RMSNorm(hidden_size, eps=1e-5),",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "                        nn.Linear(hidden_size, hidden_size),",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "                        nn.SiLU(),",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "                    ]",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "                )",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "            else:",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "                enc_layers.extend(",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "                    [",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "                        RMSNorm(hidden_size, eps=1e-5),",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "                        nn.Linear(hidden_size, outdim),",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "                    ]",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "                )",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.trunk = nn.Sequential(*enc_layers)",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -&gt; torch.Tensor:",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"(B, C) -&gt; (B, outdim)\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        return self.trunk(x)",
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "class FourierEncoderV2(nn.Module):",
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Improved Fourier feature encoder with logarithmically-spaced frequencies.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 74
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2805593013763428

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    def _initialize_qwenvl3_vlm(self, config: ReasoningVLAConfig) -&gt; None:",

          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Initialize Qwen3-VL VLM backbone.",

          },

          {
            "text": "        Qwen3-VL uses Qwen3VLForConditionalGeneration from transformers.",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "            dtype=config.model_dtype,",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.original_vocab_size = vlm_config.text_config.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "        vlm_config.text_config.vocab_size = config.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "        vlm_config.vocab_size = config.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.vlm = Qwen3VLForConditionalGeneration(vlm_config)",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "    def _initialize_trajectory_tokenizers(",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "        self, config: ReasoningVLAConfig, pretrained_modules: dict[str, Any]",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "    ) -&gt; None:",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Initialize trajectory tokenizers.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "        if \"traj_tokenizer\" in pretrained_modules:",

          },
          {
            "text": "            self.traj_tokenizer = pretrained_modules[\"traj_tokenizer\"]",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.future_token_start_idx = self.hist_token_start_idx = config.traj_token_start_idx",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "        if config.hist_traj_tokenizer_cfg is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "            self.hist_traj_tokenizer = hyu.instantiate(config.hist_traj_tokenizer_cfg)",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "            if self.traj_tokenizer is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "                self.hist_token_start_idx += self.traj_tokenizer.vocab_size",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 402
          },

          },

          },

          {
            "text": "class BaseDiffusion(ABC, nn.Module):",
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Base class for diffusion models.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        self,",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        x_dims: list[int] | tuple[int] | int,",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        *args,",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        **kwargs,",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    ):",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Initialize the BaseDiffusion model.",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        Args:",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "            x_dims: The dimension of the input tensor.",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "        super().__init__()",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.x_dims = [x_dims] if isinstance(x_dims, int) else list(x_dims)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    @abstractmethod",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    @torch.no_grad()",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    def sample(",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "        self,",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        batch_size: int,",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        step_fn: StepFn,",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "        device: torch.device = torch.device(\"cpu\"),",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        return_all_steps: bool = False,",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        *args,",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "        **kwargs,",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    ) -&gt; torch.Tensor | tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Sample from the diffusion model.",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "        Args:",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "            batch_size: The batch size.",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "            step_fn: The denoising step function that takes a noisy x and a",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "                timestep t and returns either a denoised x, a vector field or noise depending on",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "                the prediction type of the diffusion model.",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "            device: The device to use.",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "            return_all_steps: Whether to return the outputs from all steps.",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "        Returns:",

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "                The final sampled tensor [B, *x_dims] if return_all_steps is False,",

          },

          },

            "text": "        \"\"\"",

          },

            "text": "        raise NotImplementedError",

          }

          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;38:67:src/alpamayo_r1/helper.py",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "    return [",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"role\": \"system\",",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"content\": [",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "                    \"type\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "                    \"text\": \"You are a driving assistant that generates safe and accurate actions.\",",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "            ],",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"role\": \"user\",",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"content\": [{\"type\": \"image\", \"image\": frame} for frame in frames]",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "            + [",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "                    \"type\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "                    \"text\": f\"{hist_traj_placeholder}output the chain-of-thought reasoning of the driving process, then output the future trajectory.\",",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "                }",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "            ],",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "        {",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"role\": \"assistant\",",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"content\": [",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "                    \"type\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "                    \"text\": \"&lt;|cot_start|&gt;\",",

          },
          {
            "text": "                }",

          },
          {
            "text": "            ],",

          },
          {
            "text": "        },",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "    ]",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "即系统提示 + 用户提供的图像和历史轨迹 token + 要求输出推理过程和未来轨迹 + assistant 的 &#96;&lt;|cot_start|&gt;&#96; 前缀。",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "### 三、模型输出",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "模型输出包含两部分：",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 1. 预测的未来轨迹",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "pred_xyz: (B, num_traj_sets, num_traj_samples, 64, 3)     # 未来位置",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "pred_rot: (B, num_traj_sets, num_traj_samples, 64, 3, 3)   # 未来旋转",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "- **64 个路点**，每个间隔 0.1s，覆盖 **未来 6.4 秒**",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "- 所有坐标在 t0 时刻的**自车局部坐标系**下",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "- 可以采样多条轨迹（&#96;num_traj_samples&#96;）来体现不确定性",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 2. Chain-of-Causation (CoC) 推理文本",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;python",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "extra = {",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"cot\": [...],               # CoC 推理链文本",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"meta_action\": [...],       # 元动作描述",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"answer\": [...],            # 最终答案",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"timing_cot_ms\": float,     # CoT 生成耗时",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"timing_vision_ms\": float,  # 视觉编码耗时",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"timing_traj_gen_ms\": float # 轨迹扩散耗时",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "### 四、结合论文的架构分析",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "整个推理流程可以概括为 **三阶段流水线**：",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 阶段 1：视觉 + 语言编码（Qwen3-VL Backbone）",
            "lineNumber": 244
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.25972679257392883
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-03-04_18-20Z-model-input-and-output-analysis.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 242
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 269,
            "column": 8
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "#### 阶段 1：视觉 + 语言编码（Qwen3-VL Backbone）",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "多摄像头图像经过 Qwen3-VL 的视觉编码器提取视觉 token，与文本 token（包含历史轨迹 token）一起送入语言模型。对应代码中的 &#96;self.vlm.generate(...)&#96; 调用。",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 阶段 2：Chain-of-Causation 自回归推理",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "VLM 自回归生成 CoC 推理文本，解释驾驶场景中的因果关系（如\"前方有行人正在过马路 → 需要减速\"）。生成在遇到 &#96;&lt;|traj_future_start|&gt;&#96; token 时停止。这一步构建了 KV Cache，作为轨迹生成的条件。",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;239:240:src/alpamayo_r1/models/alpamayo_r1.py",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "        eos_token_id = self.tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(to_special_token(\"traj_future_start\"))",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "        stopping_criteria = StoppingCriteriaList([StopAfterEOS(eos_token_id=eos_token_id)])",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 阶段 3：扩散专家的轨迹生成",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "以 VLM 的 KV Cache 为条件，使用一个小型 Transformer Expert（独立于主 VLM backbone）执行 **Flow Matching 扩散**采样：",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "- **动作空间**：&#96;UnicycleAccelCurvatureActionSpace&#96;，每个路点 2 维 &#96;(acceleration, curvature)&#96;，共 &#96;(64, 2)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "- **扩散过程**：从高斯噪声出发，经过 ~5 步 Euler 积分去噪",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "- **去噪步骤**：噪声动作 → &#96;action_in_proj&#96;（Fourier + MLP 投影） → Expert Transformer（利用 VLM KV Cache 做 cross-attention）→ &#96;action_out_proj&#96; → 预测向量场",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "- **运动学解码**：&#96;action_to_traj&#96; 将 &#96;(accel, curvature)&#96; 通过 unicycle 运动学模型积分为 &#96;(x, y, z, rotation)&#96; 轨迹",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;324:354:src/alpamayo_r1/models/alpamayo_r1.py",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "        def step_fn(",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "            x: torch.Tensor,",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "            t: torch.Tensor,",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 270
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2543257474899292
    },

            "text": "{",

          {
            "text": "  \"description\": \"Explore alpamayo codebase structure\",",

          },
          {
            "text": "  \"prompt\": \"Explore the codebase at /data/Zhengyang/alpamayo thoroughly. I need to understand:\\n1. The overall project structure (list all directories and key files)\\n2. What model is being used (architecture, model definition files)\\n3. What dataset/dataloader is being used for input\\n4. What the model outputs are\\n5. Any configuration files that define input/output specifications\\n\\nFocus especially on:\\n- Any data loading code (datasets, dataloaders)\\n- Model definition and forward pass\\n- Configuration files (yaml, json, etc.)\\n- The README for project description\\n\\nBe very thorough - list all relevant files and their purposes. Return full file paths.\",",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"subagentType\": \"explore\",",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"model\": \"composer-1.5\",",

          },
          {
            "text": "  \"name\": \"explore\"",

          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "Additional data:",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "{",

          },
